name: Pasta All’arrabbiata

ingredients.item: 8 oz can San Marzano tomatoes plus 1 can of water

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil and 1 T red pepper flakes, you can add more or less depending on how spicy you want it. Add tomatoes, 1 can of water, chopped garlic, and salt. Simmer for 20 minutes. In the meantime, boil a pot of salted water, and add pasta, cook al dente. Add pasta to sauce directly, then add 1-2 ladles of pasta water. Mix well, add half of the parsley, mix and manticare. Garnish with grated pecorino and put the rest of the parsley on top. Serves 2-3. Olé
